## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One paragraph max. Link the issue it closes if applicable. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `refactor` — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, dependencies, config

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] A changeset was added (`npx changeset`) if this affects published behaviour
- [ ] Security implications considered (path traversal, secret exposure, dep vulns)
